_comment: Project-level hooks: hindsight (semantic memory) + think (deep reasoning) + codebase-memory-mcp (code structure). DCP plugin runs automatically.

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[hindsight] Semantic memory available: hindsight_recall (search history), hindsight_retain (save findings). bank_id auto-managed."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[think] Deep reasoning available: use think tool for complex analysis, multi-step planning, or when stuck on hard problems."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[codebase-memory-mcp] Code structure available: search_graph (find symbols by label/name/file), trace_path (trace call chains inbound/outbound), get_architecture (overview: languages/routes/hotspots)."}}'
